title: MINU
notes: This project was an incredible learning experience for me. I've had to learn Marvelous Designer and Substance Painter from scratch to implement the clients clothing into the 3D scene. Additionally I learned to actively think about creating a story/theme inside the images I create. Love you Elliot!
software: Blender, Zbrush, Daz3D, Substance Painter, Marvelous Designer
